title: machaerina elynanthoides
intro: Machaerina elynanthoides, also known as the Elymus grass, is a type of grass native to Australia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Machaerina elynanthoides can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Australian herbal medicine.
